articles.author: Gene Maddaus
articles.title: WGA Reaches Surprise Deal With Studios a Month Before Contract Expires - Variety
articles.description: The Writers Guild of America has reached a tentative agreement with the studios, nearly a month before its contract was due to expire.
articles.content:
The Writers Guild of America has made a surprise deal with the major studios, nearly a month before the union’s contract was due to expire.
